titleStmt.title: SII 8.66: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 66. (A.R. No. 477 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE FIRST PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum porcayap pāvaiyuñ cirttanic celviyu n=ta ṉ perun=te viyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutiya(l) lūḻiyil liṭaituṟaināṭu n tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuṟaṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal liḻattaraicartam muṭiyu māṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyu min=ti raṉāramum teṉticai Iḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻan=ti vuñ ceruviṟ ciṉavi lirupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cānti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanetik kulapperumalai(y)kaḷum vikkiramavīrar cakkirakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavalla maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaiy vaḷar nāmaṇaikoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiA portion is built in at the right end.
ṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti yātiñakaravaiyiṟ can=ti ran tolkulat tin=ti rarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉak kuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣai yamum pūcurarcer nalkkocalaināṭu n=ta ṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭa(p)puttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇai kirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=ta can=ta ṉ māviḻin=to ṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭal mahivāḷaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟa liyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teripuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāmavicaiyo
taraiyaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyiṟp piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttava nakanakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉaimaṇip putavamuṅ kaṉamaṇik katavamum niṟaicīrvicaiyamu n tuṟainīrp panṉaiyum vaṉmalai yūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭa lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkācopamuṅ koppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricai mevilipaṅkamum vaḷaippain tūṟuṭai viḷaippain tūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamun titamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutir kaṭun=ti ṟa lilāmuritecamum teṉakkavārpoḻil māṉakkavāramu n=to ṭukaṭaṟk kāvaṟ kaṭumuṟaṭ
ṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanma rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9Āvatu Uṭaiyār rājentra coḻatevar paṇimakaṉ śrīcoḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalakkūṟṟattu rājarāja nallūr rāja rājanallūruṭaiyāṉ pāṇṭi Utaiyativākaraṉ tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyil Eḻun=ta ruḷuvitta piccatevarkku trisandhi mukkālu n=ti ruvamutuceytaruḷac ciṟukālaikku tiruvamurtarici Irunāḻiyum Ucciyampotaikkut tiruvamutarici nānāḻiyum Iravaikku tiruvamutarici Irunāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku tiruvamutarici kuṟuṇiyināl Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu patakku nānāḻiyum sandhi Oṉṟiṉukku kaṟiyamutu paruppu Uḻakkum porikkaṟi Oṉṟum puḻukkukkaṟi Oṉṟum Ākakkaṟi
lu nāḻi yuriyāka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nellu nānāḻi yuriyum nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku miḷaku Iru(c)ceviṭaraikkum Uppu Āḻākkukkum nellu nāḻi Uḻakkum sandhi Oṉṟukku neyyamutu Iruceviṭaraiyāka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku neyyamutu Āḻākke Irucevi ṭaraikku nellu Irunāḻiyum sandhi Oṉṟukku tayiramurtu Uriyāka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku tayiramutu nāḻi Urikku nellu nāḻi yuriyum sandhi Oṉṟukku Aṭaikkāyamutu veṟumpākku nālum veṟṟilai Eṭṭum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku veṟumpākku paṉṉiraṇṭukkum veṟṟilai yirupattunālukku nellu nāḻi yuriyum sandhi viḷakku ciṟukāṭṭikkuRead ciṟukālaikku. Iraṇṭum Ucciyampotaikku Iraṇṭum Iṟavaikku nālum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku sandhi viḷakku Eṭṭiṉukku Eṇṇai yurikku nellu nāṉāḻiyum tiruvārātaṉai ceyvāṉ
Uḷpaṭa nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟiṉukku tiruvaṇṇāmalai Eṉṉum marakkālāl nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇi Irunāḻi muvuḻakkāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu nūṟṟaṟupatiṉ kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi Iṉṉellukku vilaikkuk koṇṭa nilamāvatu tiruvaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār tevatāṉaṅ kiḻaṇṇāttu nālāṭikkiṇa ṟuṭppaṭa kiḻaippaṭṭiyum naṭuviṟpaṭṭiyum melaippaṭṭiyum Ālaiyettappaṭṭiyum Ākap paṭṭi nālukkum kiḻpāṟkellai naṅkaikoyiṟpaṭṭikkum Aṇaiōṭaikkum meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai periyeri vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai Aricāṇippaṭṭikkum ciṟṟattiettappaṭṭikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭakkil ciṟṟatti yettappaṭṭikkut teṟkkum
m Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiye tiruvaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyār Aruḷāl śaṇḍeśvarade varum tevakaṉmikaḷumpakkal poruḷaṟa kkuṭuttu vilaiyaṟak koṇṭa Innilam Uḻutu melvārattāl van=ta nellu tevarpaṇṭāratte Aḷappatānom kiḻaṇṇāttuūrom Innelluk koṇṭu Innivan=ta m tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyeṉṉum marakkālāle śantrā tittaval tevarpaṇṭārattile koṇṭu niccal nivan=ta ñ celuttakkaṭavomānom tevakaṉmikaḷom Iva(ṉ)ṉe tiruvaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār tirukkārttikait tirunāḷil tiruveṭṭai Eḻuntaruḷiirun=tā l perun=ti ruvamirtu ceytaruḷavum Aṭiyārkkuc caṭṭiccoṟu prasāda ñceytaruḷavum kuṭutta poṉ Eḻu kaḻaiñcil Ittevar tevatāṉa brahma te
ṅgalattu sabhai yoṅ koṇṭa poṉ nāṟkkaḻaiñcukku Āṇṭuvarai kaḻaiñciṉvāy ttiruvaṇṇāmalaiyeṉṉum marakkālāl nellu(k) kalamāka tiruvamitarici kalattukku nellu Irukalane tūṇip patakkum kaṟiyamirtu Aiñcukku nellu patakku nānāḻiyum puḷiṅkaṟiyamirtukku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum miḷaku Āḻākkukku nellu nānāḻiyum Uppu nāḻikku nellu Irunāḻiyum cirakam Oruceviṭe kālukku nellu Irunāḻiyum neyyamirtu nāḻikku nellup patakkum tayiramirtu kuṟuṇikku nellu Irunāḻiyum vāḻaippaḻam Eṭṭiṉukku nellu nānāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamitu veṟuṅkāy Irupatukkum veṟṟilai Eṇpatukkum nellu nānāḻiyum vāḻaikkuruttukku nellu Irunāḻiyum viṟakukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum kucakkalattukku nellu tūṇiyum Aṭuvārkku nellup patakkum Āka nellu nāṟkkalattukkuc can=ti rātittava
tuvomānom puliyūrnāṭiścaturvve timaṅkalattu sabhai yom . vayiramekaścaturvveti maṅkalattu sagai yoṅ koṇṭa poṉ kkaḻaiñcukku Āṇṭuvarai kaḻaiñciṉvāyp poliūṭṭut tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyeṉṉum marakkālāl nelluk kalamāka Uṭaiyār tiruveṭṭai Eḻun=ta ruḷiirun tu caṭṭiccoṟu prasāda ñceytaruḷa caṭṭi Oṉṟukku Arici Irunāḻiyāka caṭṭi Irupatukku Arici Ai(y)ṅkuṟuṇikku Aiñciraṇṭākki nelluk kalane nānāḻiyum kaṟi Aiñcukku nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum puḷiṅkaṟikku nellu tūṇiyum miḷaku Uḻakkukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum Uppu nāḻi Urikku nellu muṉṉāḻiyum cirakam Iruceviṭaraikku nellu nānāḻiyum caṭṭi Oṉṟukku ney Iruceviṭaraiyāka ney nāḻi Uḻakkukku nellup patakku nānāḻiyum caṭṭi Oṉṟukku tayir Uriyākat tayirk kuṟuṇi Irunāḻikku nellu kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum veruṅkāy Eṇpatukku
nellu kkuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum Aṭaveṇṭuṅ kucakkalattukkum caṭṭi Irupatukkum perakal nāṟpatukkum ciṟṟakal Irupatukkum nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum virakukku nellu Aiññāḻiyum Aṭuvārkku nellu kkuṟuṇiyum caṭṭi mūṭikkuṭukkum vāḻaiyilaikku nellu nānāḻiyum Āka nellu mukkalattukkum poṉ mukkaḻaiñcuṅ koṇṭu śantrā tittaval Ipparice Innivantam celuttavomānom vayiramekaścaturvve timaṅkalattu sabhai yom . Ivaṉe tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭaiyārkku pañcagavya māṭiyaruḷa nittamum ciṟukālaisa ntiyil tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyeṉṉum nāḻiyāl go- mu(t)tra ram Uḻakkum go mayam Āḻākkum pāl nāḻiuḻakkum tayir nāḻiuriyum ney nāḻiyum Āka Ippaṭi nittamum muṭṭa
ṉ Eḻun=ta ruḷuvitta piccatevarkku vaitta tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku viṭṭa cāvā muvāp perāṭu nūṟṟutoṇṇūṟṟu Iraṇṭu Ivvāṭu koṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku nicatappaṭiyum muṭṭāme śantrā tittaval Erippatānom tiruvaṇṇāmalai maṉṟāṭikaḷom Ivaṉe Uṭaiyār śrīvimāṉattai cūḻa Ir(ā)vaisandhi kku Aṇukkaviḷakkāka Eriya vaitta viḷakku Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Iruceviṭaraiyāka sandhi viḷakkup patiṉāliṉukku viṭṭa cāvā muvāp perāṭu muṉṉūṟṟu muppattāṟu Ivvāṭu koṇ ṭiccan=ti viḷakkup patiṉālum niccaṟppaṭiyum muṭṭāme can=ti rātittaval Erippatāṉo n=ti ruvaṇṇāmalai maṉṟāṭikaḷom .
Digital edition of SII 8.66 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
